strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq with MCP code generators and real-world AI product exposure
Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries demonstrating technical depth and initiative
concerns: No explicit evidence of Master’s/PhD in AI-related field, despite preferred qualification
Limited visibility of direct cloud platform strategy experience or large-scale AI product ownership at director level
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing strategic advisory in EU markets
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep technical breadth across AI-agent systems, cloud infrastructure, and open-source product development, aligning strongly with the role’s innovation and strategy focus. His hands-on work with AI tooling and agentic workflows at re:cinq is a key differentiator. However, the absence of an advanced AI degree and limited evidence of direct cloud product strategy leadership slightly reduce alignment with preferred qualifications.
